!Energy losses of electrons, parameter < 0 if electrons lose energy, integrated up to a given time [eV cm-3],
!tot_int - total integrated losses,
!rot_int - pure H2 rotational excitation, only transitions with the same vibrational quantum nb,
!vibr_int - H2 ro-vibrational excitation (within the ground electronic state, including pure rotational transitions),
!vibr01_int - H2 ro-vibrational excitation v = 0 -> 1 (within the ground electronic state),
!elec_s_int - due to H2 electronic states excitation (singlet), including dissociative excitation,
!elec_t_int - due to H2 electronic states excitation (triplet), including dissociative excitation,
!ion_int - molecule/atom ionization,
!hei_int - HeI excitation by electron impact,
!mt_int - momentum transfer, 
!ecoul_int - Coulomb loses on electrons,
!ncoll_int - neutral heating rate due to collisions H2-H2, H2-He,
!ndiss_int - neutral heating rate due to H2 dissociation (two-step dissociation, triplet excitation), > 0
! H nuclei concentration [cm-3], nb of times,
! 2.000e+04      151    
!time(s)    tot_int     rot_int     vibr_int    vibr01_int  elec_s_int  elec_t_int  ion_int     hei_int     mt_int      ecoul_int   ncoll_int   ndiss_int
